name: Sharetribe Marketplace API
tagline: Marketplace listings, user flows and transactions
description: Build the end-user marketplace experience with Sharetribe's Marketplace API. Browse and inspect listings, manage the authenticated user's own listings, publish drafts, and start transactions with bearer access tokens.

auth.hint: Use an access token in the Authorization header. Obtain it through the Sharetribe Authentication API or the Sharetribe SDK; some endpoints accept anonymous tokens, while others require an authenticated user token.

tools.name: query_listings
tools.description: Search marketplace listings by keywords, author, state, or sort order.

params.name: keywords
params.description: Search terms matched against listing title, description, and searchable extended data

params.name: authorId
params.description: Filter by the author's listing UUID

params.name: states
params.description: Comma-separated listing states such as published or closed

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort fields such as createdAt, price, or -createdAt

tools.name: show_listing
tools.description: Get a listing by its UUID with the fields needed for a listing detail view.

params.name: id
params.description: Listing UUID

tools.name: query_own_listings
tools.description: List the authenticated user's own listings, including drafts and published listings.

params.name: keywords
params.description: Search terms matched against own listing title, description, and searchable extended data

params.name: states
params.description: Comma-separated listing states such as draft, published, or closed

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort fields such as createdAt or -createdAt

tools.name: create_draft_listing
tools.description: Create a new draft listing for the authenticated user.

params.name: title
params.description: Listing title

params.name: description
params.description: Listing description

params.name: geolocation
params.description: Listing location with latitude and longitude

params.name: price
params.description: Listing price object with amount and currency

params.name: availabilityPlan
params.description: Availability plan for day-based or time-based booking

params.name: publicData
params.description: Public extended data for the listing

params.name: images
params.description: Array of image UUIDs to attach to the listing

tools.name: update_listing
tools.description: Update an existing own listing without changing its state.

params.name: id
params.description: Listing UUID

params.name: title
params.description: Listing title

params.name: description
params.description: Listing description

params.name: geolocation
params.description: Listing location with latitude and longitude

params.name: price
params.description: Listing price object with amount and currency

params.name: availabilityPlan
params.description: Full availability plan for the listing

params.name: publicData
params.description: Public extended data for the listing

params.name: images
params.description: Array of image UUIDs to set on the listing

tools.name: publish_draft_listing
tools.description: Publish a draft listing so it becomes discoverable in the marketplace.

params.name: id
params.description: Draft listing UUID

tools.name: initiate_transaction
tools.description: Start a marketplace transaction for a listing.

params.name: processAlias
params.description: Transaction process alias, for example default-booking/release-1

params.name: transition
params.description: Initial transition name for the transaction process

params.name: params
params.description: Process parameters such as listingId, bookingStart, bookingEnd, seats, and cardToken
